title: CorpFlowAI homepage hero
description: Above-the-fold hero on https://corpflowai.com/. Calm modern executive workspace — brushed oak meeting table, frosted-glass partitions, brushed-brass accents, soft natural daylight. No people, no electronics, no text, no logos.

licence.terms: Generated under the CorpFlowAI vetted prompt library (see CORPFLOW_PROMPT_LIBRARY.md, prompt_id: corpflow-homepage-hero). Reviewed against BRAND_AND_CONVERSION_DOCTRINE.md. No third-party IP used. Free to use across CorpFlowAI marketing surfaces.

accessibility.alt: A calm sunlit modern executive workspace with a long brushed-oak meeting table, a single matte-black document folder, and full-height reeded glass partitions in the background.

usage.notes: slot:homepage_hero. Above-the-fold; renderer should mark eager. Responsive WebP set is /assets/visuals/corpflow-homepage-hero-{1920,1280,768}.webp — runtime currently selects the 1920w default and lets the browser/CSS scale; a future iteration may add a srcset wrapper.

prompt_provenance.notes: First production homepage hero. Reviewed against BRAND_AND_CONVERSION_DOCTRINE.md — calm, structured, real, no AI tropes (no neon / robots / holograms / glowing brains / stock-photo feel). Matches Architectural Digest editorial reference.
